claim_text: The intervention improved overall retention by 8.2 percentage points.
Every cohort improved retention after the intervention.
The primary outcome was pre-registered as retention at day 30.
The Appendix D subgroup ablation can be reproduced from the deposited files.
The treatment reduced support tickets by 12 percent.
No adverse events were reported in peer review.
The analysis can be rerun end-to-end with the provided package.
The mobile subgroup had the largest retention lift.
The reported retention lift should be 7.4 percentage points after errata.
The intervention improved activation in all regions.
The exported table includes a p-value for retention lift.
The paper proves causal impact for all customers.
The methods appendix states the sample excluded trial accounts.
